# signUp

<!-- @constructive-io/graphql-codegen - DO NOT EDIT -->

Execute the signUp mutation

## Usage

```bash
csdk sign-up --input.clientMutationId <String> --input.email <String> --input.password <String> --input.rememberMe <Boolean> --input.credentialKind <String> --input.csrfToken <String>
```

## Examples

### Run signUp

```bash
csdk sign-up --input.clientMutationId <String> --input.email <String> --input.password <String> --input.rememberMe <Boolean> --input.credentialKind <String> --input.csrfToken <String>
```
